claims.paper_claim: CESE-OCN models claim-evidence calibration as ordinal exceedance.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: CESE-OCN casts claim-evidence calibration as ordinal exceedance between claim strength and evidence support on a shared tier scale.
forbidden_wording: CESE-OCN is a production deployment system.
CESE-OCN is a final benchmark for SimClaim-Eval.

claims.paper_claim: escalation_label is derived from ordinal exceedance (claim_tier > support_tier on any dimension).
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: We define escalation as any ordinal claim tier exceeding its support tier.
forbidden_wording: The dataset is a final benchmark.
escalation_label is a free-form human judgement with no rule.

claims.paper_claim: Shared thresholds place claim strength and evidence support on a common ordinal scale.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: A single set of shared thresholds maps claim strength and evidence support onto the same 0..4 ordinal scale.
forbidden_wording: We calibrate separate thresholds per branch with no shared scale.

claims.paper_claim: Non-compensatory constraints prevent unsupported dimensions from being compensated by unrelated evidence strength.
allowed_wording: We enforce a non-compensatory truncation so that an unsupported dimension cannot be rescued by evidence strength on unrelated dimensions.
forbidden_wording: CESE-OCN sums evidence strengths freely across dimensions.

claims.paper_claim: Human pilot data contains double-annotated/adjudicated simulation claim-evidence pairs.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: The pilot split was double-annotated and adjudicated; inter-annotator agreement is reported per dimension.
forbidden_wording: The dataset is a final benchmark.
The dataset is a fully adjudicated paper-full benchmark (n_test>=100).

claims.paper_claim: Significance is confirmatory only if n_test>=100; otherwise exploratory.
blocking_reason: n_test=30 < 100; significance is exploratory, not confirmatory.
allowed_wording: Statistical significance on the pilot split (n_test<100) is exploratory and must not be reported as confirmatory.
forbidden_wording: We confirm the hypothesis at p<0.05 on the pilot split.

claims.paper_claim: Main results compare CESE-OCN with fair lexical and TF-IDF baselines.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: On the pilot split, CESE-OCN is compared against lexical-cue and TF-IDF fair baselines under the same train/dev/test protocol.
forbidden_wording: CESE-OCN outperforms all baselines on a paper-full benchmark.
evidence_only_tfidf_logistic is a fair baseline.

claims.paper_claim: Evidence-only baseline is diagnostic/leakage-risk, not a fair comparison.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: The evidence-only baseline is reported as an oracle / leakage diagnostic and excluded from the fair main comparison.
forbidden_wording: evidence_only_tfidf_logistic is a fair main baseline.
CESE-OCN outperforms the evidence-only baseline in a fair comparison.

claims.paper_claim: Strong baselines (structured_llm_judge, nli_scifact_style, ragas_style, ares_style, pairwise_llm_judge) are reported only when metric_valid=true.
allowed_wording: Strong baselines that lacked an API key are reported as skipped (missing_api_key) and excluded from any superiority claim.
forbidden_wording: CESE-OCN outperforms all strong baselines.
All strong baselines were evaluated.

claims.paper_claim: Calibration ablation shows shared-threshold ordinal calibration improves over no calibration.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: On the pilot split, shared-threshold ordinal calibration reaches macro-F1 at least as high as the no-calibration variant.
forbidden_wording: Calibration ablation confirms superiority on a paper-full benchmark.

claims.paper_claim: Constraint ablation shows full CESE-OCN beats no-constraints and partial-gate variants on high-strength false support.
blocking_reason: full_cese row metric_valid=false or n_samples=0; constraint ablation cannot support any constraint-superiority claim.
allowed_wording: On the pilot split, full CESE-OCN achieves a lower high-strength false-support rate than the no-constraints variant.
forbidden_wording: Constraint ablation confirms superiority on a paper-full benchmark.
Full CESE-OCN achieves perfect monotonicity on the pilot split.

claims.paper_claim: Adversarial robustness is claimed only if adversarial_results has CESE rows with n_samples>0 on standard + >=2 adversarial splits.
blocking_reason: cese_ocn valid splits=['Domain-held-out test', 'Lexical-adversarial test', 'Logical-sample-held-out test', 'Standard test', 'Style-balanced test', 'Template-held-out test']; need standard + 2 adversarial splits.
allowed_wording: Fair baseline robustness on cue_words_removed and style_balanced splits is reported; CESE-OCN adversarial robustness is not claimed because the checkpoint is not available for adversarial evaluation.
forbidden_wording: CESE-OCN is robust to adversarial cue removal.
CESE-OCN maintains accuracy on all adversarial splits.

claims.paper_claim: Oracle / extracted / confidence-aware evidence modes are compared only when all three modes exist with valid metrics.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: On the pilot split, oracle, extracted, and confidence-aware evidence modes are compared on the same logical samples.
forbidden_wording: We compare only oracle evidence.
Extracted and confidence-aware modes are not needed.

claims.paper_claim: CESE-OCN evidence-mode comparison requires the CESE checkpoint.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: Fair-baseline evidence-mode comparison is reported; CESE-OCN evidence-mode comparison is blocked because the checkpoint is not shipped with the pilot release (see docs/checkpoint_policy.md).
forbidden_wording: CESE-OCN outperforms fair baselines across all three evidence modes.

claims.paper_claim: Error analysis is reported at the per-dimension level on the pilot split.
blocking_reason: Release is human pilot (n_test<100, dataset_status=human_audited_pilot). Pilot findings only; not a paper-full benchmark claim.
allowed_wording: We report per-dimension error decomposition on the pilot split as a diagnostic of where CESE-OCN fails.
forbidden_wording: Error analysis confirms the model is deployment-ready.

claims.paper_claim: The current release is a human pilot (n_test<100), not a paper-full benchmark; paper_ready must remain false.
allowed_wording: This release is a human pilot (n_test<100) and not a paper-full benchmark; all quantitative findings are diagnostic.
forbidden_wording: We present a final benchmark for SimClaim-Eval.
paper_ready=true.
